---
title: "LED the Way"
---

- [01 Overview](01%20Overview.qmd)

- [02 A Simple Circuit](02%20A%20Simple%20Circuit.qmd)

- [03 Calculations](03%20Calculations.qmd)

- [04 Replicating AND and OR](04%20Replicating%20AND%20and%20OR.qmd)

- [05 Programming the Pi for Input and Output](05%20Programming%20the%20Pi%20for%20Input%20and%20Output.qmd)

- [06 Programming AND and OR](06%20Programming%20AND%20and%20OR.qmd)

- [07 Homework](07%20Homework.qmd)
